migrations.backwardCompatibility: P1 additive foundation; no prior application data exists
migrations.dataEffect: Seeds only CFG-001 through CFG-008 definitions; no policy values
migrations.recovery: Rollback the uncommitted transaction; use a reviewed forward-fix after commit

migrations.backwardCompatibility: P2 additive schemas and policies; P1 application contracts remain compatible
migrations.dataEffect: No business content, policy values, provider objects, or external-upload enablement
migrations.expectedLock: Extension catalog and new-object catalog locks only
migrations.recovery: Rollback the uncommitted transaction; use a reviewed forward-fix after commit

migrations.backwardCompatibility: Lean V1 additive core workflow; P1/P2 contracts remain compatible
migrations.dataEffect: No customer, commercial, payment, production, fulfilment, or notification rows are seeded
migrations.recovery: Rollback the uncommitted transaction; use a reviewed forward-fix after commit

migrations.backwardCompatibility: Additive customer fulfilment confirmation; existing order data remains readable
migrations.dataEffect: Adds nullable fulfilment confirmation timestamp and validates confirmed snapshots
migrations.expectedLock: Brief table metadata lock on fulfilment.fulfilments
migrations.recovery: Rollback the uncommitted transaction; use a reviewed forward-fix after commit

migrations.backwardCompatibility: Additive public product image support; existing catalog products remain readable
migrations.dataEffect: Adds catalog product image records and primary-image constraints
migrations.expectedLock: Brief metadata locks while creating the table, indexes, grants, and policies
migrations.recovery: Rollback the uncommitted transaction; use a reviewed forward-fix after commit

migrations.backwardCompatibility: Additive private payment receipt storage bucket; existing workflow remains compatible
migrations.dataEffect: Creates or updates one private Supabase Storage bucket without changing business rows
migrations.recovery: Delete the payment-proofs bucket only after confirming it contains no required receipts

migrations.backwardCompatibility: Additive service operations, customer profiles, request history, and custom-design uploads
migrations.dataEffect: Backfills readable request references; adds nullable customer profile and lifecycle metadata; creates one private storage bucket
migrations.expectedLock: Brief metadata locks on customer, request, request-item, and order tables
migrations.recovery: Rollback the uncommitted transaction; use a reviewed forward-fix after commit
migrations.verification: npm run migrations:check && npm run typecheck
